title: DarkerKnights Armors
description: Change the iron, gold, diamond and netherite default armor design for something more knight.
body:
![Darker Knights Armor banner](https://i.imgur.com/JRAYKFy.png)

**What does this resourcepack?**

DarkerKnights Armors replace 4 of the vanilla amors for my own designs.

Replace the: Iron armor, golden armor, diamond armor, netherite armor.

Change the armor design and the items textures too.

![4 Replaced armors](https://i.imgur.com/KIW4zwQ.png)
